title: NoobMSG
description: NoobMSG is a lightweight and customizable private messaging plugin for Velocity proxy servers. It allows players to send private messages, reply quickly, and lets admins monitor messages when needed.
body:
# NoobMSG – Advanced Private Messaging for Velocity
NoobMSG is a lightweight and customizable private messaging system for Velocity-powered proxy servers. It allows players to send private messages, reply quickly, and lets administrators monitor messages when necessary.

## 🔹 Features:
✔ Private Messaging – Send direct messages to other players (/msg)           
✔ Quick Reply – Easily respond to the last received message (/reply)        
✔ Message Spy – Admins can monitor private messages (/msgspy)         
✔ Toggle Messages – Players can disable private messages (/msgtoggle)          

## 🔹 Commands:
📩 /msg <player> <message> – Send a private message        
📩 /reply <message> – Reply to the last received message          
👀 /msgspy – Toggle message spying (Requires noobmsg.spy)         
🚫 /msgtoggle – Disable or enable private messages         

## 🔹 Installation:
1️⃣ Download NoobMSG.jar and place it in your Velocity plugins folder       
2️⃣ Restart the server         
3️⃣ Configure settings in config.yml           
4️⃣ Use /msg to start chatting privately!       

### 🚀 Enhance your Velocity proxy with a robust private messaging system!
